node.title: [Discussion] Uber SDE-1 Interview – Cleared OA, Next Round is BPS (Need Guidance)

article.title: [Discussion] Uber SDE-1 Interview – Cleared OA, Next Round is BPS (Need Guidance)
article.content:
Hi everyone,

I recently appeared for the Uber SDE-1 Online Assessment and I’m happy to share that I qualified . I’ve now been shortlisted for the next stage, which is the BPS Round (disqualification round).

Here are the details I received:


Duration: 1 hour

45 minutes – General Coding Assessment

15 minutes – High-Level System Design

They mentioned that this round will assess overall coding proficiency and system design principles. Only after clearing this round will I move on to the further interview stages.

My Questions:

What kind of coding problems can I expect here? (DSA-based like the OA, or slightly harder?)

For the 15 min System Design part, what level of depth do they usually expect for SDE-1?

Any suggestions on how to prepare effectively in the few days I have left?

post.content: In how much time you have solved all  the questions?
Bro how much time did you take and did you solved all problems ?
solved all three in half an hour, yet no shortlisting :<
What was your score out of 600 in OA?
Is there any specific reason you feel like you got shortlisted?\n
How did you get shortlisted? Any referral?
How many year of experience do you have ?
When did you gave OA? And received results today?
